positive: A whimsical, highly stylized illustration of forest spirits and flora, depicting luminous moths, glowing mushroom clusters, and twisting tree roots. Central composition with strong, defined silhouettes. The style should mimic detailed, high-contrast woodcut etching mixed with subtle watercolor washes. Color palette: deep forest emeralds, midnight indigo, and accents of glowing gold and teal bioluminescence. Focus on symmetry and negative space, making the design inherently print-friendly and legible on fabric. Vector illustration quality, clean lines, elegant symmetry.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, graffiti, low detail, amateur, poor anatomy, extra limbs, harsh shading, gradient noise
